title: RBAC Misconfiguration - Privilege Escalation Through Overly Permissive Roles
description: In this lab you will audit an existing RBAC configuration where a developer service account has been accidentally granted cluster-wide admin permissions through a misconfigured ClusterRoleBinding. You will identify the overly permissive role, remove the dangerous binding, and create a properly scoped Role and RoleBinding that follows the principle of least privilege.
